_instructions: Remove the leading underscore from field names (e.g. '_id' → 'id') to activate a question. All active questions are merged with the AgentReady golden base set on every evaluation run.

questions._comment: Add project-specific eval questions here. AgentReady will merge these with the golden base set on every eval run. Remove the leading underscore from 'id' etc. to activate a question.
questions._prompt: How do you start hello_world in development mode?

_ground_truth_extraction.llm_prompt: What is the command to start hello_world locally? Read app.py.

questions._evaluation_criteria: Must include the exact run command for hello_world.

questions._prompt: What happens to data when the application restarts?

_ground_truth_extraction.llm_prompt: Does this application persist data across restarts? Read all source files carefully.

questions._evaluation_criteria: Must accurately describe the persistence (or lack of) behaviour.
